description: T609 MarketplaceCheckoutGateway MUST validate BOLA at ORDER 1: cart.buyerTenantId MUST equal tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage. Any cart access without BOLA check at ORDER 1 enables cross-tenant cart takeover.
resolution: T609 resolves tenantId from ALS and compares cart.buyerTenantId === tenantId at executionOrder=1. Mismatch returns DataProcessResult.failure('BOLA_VIOLATION'). BOLA after SETNX = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T609 performs SETNX cart lock before BOLA check
T609 accepts tenantId from request payload instead of ALS
T609 does not validate cart.buyerTenantId against ALS tenantId
passConditions: T609 resolves tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage at executionOrder=1
cart.buyerTenantId === ALS.tenantId check before any write or lock
BOLA mismatch returns DataProcessResult.failure('BOLA_VIOLATION') immediately

description: T609 MarketplaceCheckoutGateway MUST acquire SETNX cart lock at ORDER 2 with TTL from FREEDOM config key 'checkout_lock_ttl_ms'. Lock before BOLA or hardcoded TTL = BUILD_FAILURE.
resolution: T609 calls SETNX(cart-lock:{cartId}) at ORDER 2 after BOLA passes. TTL from freedom.getConfig('checkout_lock_ttl_ms'). Lock collision returns DataProcessResult.failure('CART_LOCKED').
blockConditions: T609 acquires cart lock before BOLA check
T609 uses hardcoded TTL value for cart lock instead of FREEDOM config
T609 does not use SETNX for cart lock acquisition
passConditions: T609 calls SETNX at executionOrder=2 after BOLA passes
cart lock TTL read from freedom.getConfig('checkout_lock_ttl_ms')
Lock collision returns DataProcessResult.failure('CART_LOCKED') immediately

description: T609 MarketplaceCheckoutGateway MUST use OCC (Optimistic Concurrency Control) for inventory reservation at ORDER 3-4, after cart lock is acquired. Reservation before lock allows concurrent checkouts to oversell the same item.
resolution: T609 reserves inventory with OCC at ORDER 3-4 after SETNX lock. OCC conflict returns DataProcessResult.failure('OCC_CONFLICT'). Reservation before lock = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T609 reserves inventory before acquiring SETNX cart lock
T609 does not use OCC for inventory reservation
inventory reservation at ORDER 1 or 2 before cart lock
passConditions: T609 performs OCC inventory reservation at executionOrder=3-4 after lock

Inventory only reserved after SETNX lock confirmed

resolution: T609 calls storeDocument(checkoutAudit) then enqueue(CheckoutReserved). enqueue before storeDocument = BUILD_FAILURE per DNA-8 contract.

description: T610 MarketplacePaymentSplitter MUST use SETNX(hash(tenantId+cartId+totalAmountCents)) as idempotency key. Using cartId alone allows retries with different totalAmountCents to double-charge the buyer.
resolution: T610 computes idempotencyKey = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(tenantId+cartId+totalAmountCents).digest('hex'). SETNX(idempotencyKey) at ORDER 1. cartId-only key = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T610 uses cartId as idempotency key without tenantId or totalAmountCents
T610 idempotency key does not include totalAmountCents — allows amount-override double charge
SETNX absent from T610 payment capture path
passConditions: T610 computes idempotency key as hash(tenantId+cartId+totalAmountCents)
SETNX(idempotencyKey) at executionOrder=1 — unconditional return on collision
On key collision T610 returns cached result without any payment processing

description: T610 MarketplacePaymentSplitter platformFeeBps MUST come from FREEDOM config key 'platform_fee_bps'. Hardcoded fee percentage cannot be adjusted by operators and violates FREEDOM/MACHINE boundary.
resolution: T610 reads platform_fee_bps from freedom.getConfig('platform_fee_bps'). Hardcoded BPS constant = BUILD_FAILURE per Rule 14 (Config Over Code).

description: T611 MarketplaceEscrowController LIFO compensation MUST execute [REFUND_PAYMENT, RESTORE_INVENTORY] in that order. FIFO order (RESTORE then REFUND) leaves buyer money captured while inventory is available for purchase by concurrent buyers.
resolution: T611 defines COMPENSATION_STEPS_LIFO = ['REFUND_PAYMENT', 'RESTORE_INVENTORY'] as const. REFUND at index 0, RESTORE at index 1. FIFO or reversed array = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: T611 executes RESTORE_INVENTORY before REFUND_PAYMENT (FIFO order)
COMPENSATION_STEPS array is ['RESTORE_INVENTORY', 'REFUND_PAYMENT']

passConditions: COMPENSATION_STEPS_LIFO = ['REFUND_PAYMENT', 'RESTORE_INVENTORY'] as const
REFUND_PAYMENT executes at compensation step 0 before RESTORE_INVENTORY
Compensation saga halts if REFUND_PAYMENT fails — RESTORE not attempted until REFUND succeeds
